btc_20pct_drop_probability.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time. Calibrate based on: consensus among agents (what fraction expect a drop vs hold); intensity of panic vs calm rhetoric; concrete BTC price targets mentioned ("BTC to $14k", "BTC sub-$17k by morning"); reports of institutional/whale selling; correlation arguments (e.g. "if SOL goes, BTC goes"). 0.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC holds; 1.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC will definitely break $16,400.

contagion_breadth_score.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.

ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.

panic_score.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.

outcome_schema.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time. Calibrate based on: consensus among agents (what fraction expect a drop vs hold); intensity of panic vs calm rhetoric; concrete BTC price targets mentioned ("BTC to $14k", "BTC sub-$17k by morning"); reports of institutional/whale selling; correlation arguments (e.g. "if SOL goes, BTC goes"). 0.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC holds; 1.0 = the branch consensus is that BTC will definitely break $16,400.
outcome_schema.name: btc_20pct_drop_probability

outcome_schema.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.
outcome_schema.name: ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability

outcome_schema.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.
outcome_schema.name: contagion_breadth_score

outcome_schema.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.
outcome_schema.name: panic_score

outcome_schema.description: Did 3+ posts discuss the possibility of Binance acquiring FTX?
outcome_schema.name: cz_acquisition_mentioned

outcome_schema.description: Did agents report SOL dropping 30%+ from its $32 starting price?
outcome_schema.name: sol_dump_observed

outcome_schema.description: Did agents express concern about USDT/USDC contagion from the FTX collapse (e.g. "Tether next?")?
outcome_schema.name: stablecoin_contagion_concern

outcome_schema.description: Did 2+ agents mention SEC/CFTC/DOJ likely involvement or specific regulator names as imminently relevant?
outcome_schema.name: regulator_action_anticipated

children.label: nested_stabilizing_liquidity_injection
children.perturbation_text: FTX and Alameda Research have successfully finalized a $4 billion capital infusion from a consortium of global private equity firms. Simultaneously, a multi-sig wallet controlled by Alameda has initiated the burn of 50 million FTT tokens, effectively reducing circulating supply and boosting collateral ratios. Markets are responding with a sharp reversal as liquidity fears subside.

children.label: nested_escalating_systemic_collapse
children.perturbation_text: FTX has officially suspended all customer withdrawals, citing an 'unprecedented surge in demand' that has drained current hot wallet liquidity. On-chain analysts have confirmed that Alameda Research wallets are aggressively dumping SOL and SRM tokens to cover margin calls on multiple DeFi protocols. Bitcoin has plummeted to $17,200 as contagion fears grip the broader market.

children.label: nested_ambiguous_regulatory_intervention
children.perturbation_text: The SEC and CFTC have issued a joint statement announcing an immediate inquiry into the capital structure of FTX and its affiliated entities. While the regulators have not frozen accounts, they have mandated a 48-hour audit of all collateralized loan positions involving FTT and SOL. Market participants remain uncertain whether this signifies a protective measure or the beginning of a prolonged legal shutdown.

children.label: sbf_capital_infusion
children.perturbation_text: FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried announced a $4 billion capital injection from a consortium of private equity firms to bolster balance sheet liquidity. Alameda Research has simultaneously pledged to burn 50 million FTT tokens to address market concerns regarding supply concentration. Markets are responding positively to the news of immediate asset backing.

children.label: binance_full_acquisition
children.perturbation_text: Binance and FTX have signed a non-binding Letter of Intent for Binance to acquire FTX.com in full to cover the liquidity crunch. CZ stated that the move is intended to protect users and stabilize the broader crypto ecosystem. The agreement is subject to due diligence starting immediately.

children.label: regulatory_halt
children.perturbation_text: The SEC and CFTC have issued a joint statement announcing an immediate inquiry into FTX and Alameda Research regarding potential commingling of customer funds. As a precautionary measure, the Bahamas regulators have frozen all FTX International assets pending a full forensic audit. Withdrawal processing is suspended indefinitely.

children.label: stablecoin_depeg_fear
children.perturbation_text: Following reports of significant USDC outflows from FTX-exposed DeFi protocols, the price of USDC has briefly deviated from its $1.00 peg, trading as low as $0.98 on some decentralized exchanges. Market participants are speculating that large-scale liquidations of FTT-backed loans are forcing the sale of underlying stablecoin collateral. Tether is experiencing similar volatility as traders rush to exit liquid positions.

children.label: solana_ecosystem_collapse
children.perturbation_text: Solana has plummeted 45% in the last six hours as on-chain data confirms heavy institutional dumping from Alameda-linked wallets. Several major DeFi protocols on Solana have paused lending features due to the collapse of FTT and SRM collateral values. Retail investors are reporting mass liquidations across the Solana ecosystem.

children.label: market_sideways_uncertainty
children.perturbation_text: Market data shows a confusing tug-of-war between large whale buying and retail panic selling, resulting in BTC price oscillating within a tight $200 range. No clear direction has emerged from the SBF or CZ camps in the last four hours. Analysts remain divided on whether this is a localized exchange issue or the start of a broader contagion event.

children.label: leverage_cascade_confirmed
children.perturbation_text: On-chain analysts have identified a massive liquidation cascade triggered by the drop in FTT and SOL values, hitting multiple cross-chain bridges and lending platforms. BTC has broken support at $19,000, signaling a potential move toward 2022 lows. Contagion is spreading to secondary exchanges as they struggle to manage margin calls.

children.label: institutional_buyout_rumors
children.perturbation_text: Unconfirmed reports from Bloomberg suggest that a group of traditional finance hedge funds is in talks to acquire Alameda's toxic debt portfolio to prevent a contagion. SBF has tweeted that 'discussions are ongoing' to ensure the health of the broader industry. Markets are waiting for a concrete confirmation before committing to a reversal.
